metadata.title: Dynamic Outline
metadata.description: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off the automatic focusing of the search field when the outline window opens.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭大纲窗口打开时搜索框的自动聚焦功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off the highlighting of the corresponding heading in the outline as you scroll.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭滚动时大纲中对应标题的高亮显示。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off the ability to keep the search field text after clicking a heading.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭点击标题后保留搜索框文本的功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Automatically show or hide the outline when opening a file, based on heading count.")
regex.target: .setDesc("根据标题数量，在打开文件时自动显示或隐藏大纲。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose if the outline can overlap page content when space is limited, or if it should hide to prevent overlap.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择在空间有限时大纲是否可以与页面内容重叠，或者隐藏以防止重叠。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the minimum heading count required to automatically show the outline on file open.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置在打开文件时自动显示大纲所需的最小标题数量。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Show the outline when hovering over its button. Click the button to pin it open.")
regex.target: .setDesc("悬停在按钮上时显示大纲。点击按钮可将其固定打开。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Set the screen location for the outline window and its trigger button.")
regex.target: .setDesc("设置大纲窗口及其触发按钮的屏幕位置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off automatic heading indentation adjustments based on the previous heading's level.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭基于前一标题级别的自动标题缩进调整。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off the automatic hiding of the search bar when the outline contains only a few headings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭当大纲仅包含少数标题时搜索栏的自动隐藏功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Hide outline automatically when selecting a heading.")
.setDesc("Automatically hide the outline when the note is too narrow.")
regex.target: .setDesc("当笔记过窄时自动隐藏大纲。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off the ability to collapse/expand heading sections within the outline.")
regex.target: .setDesc("关闭在大纲内折叠/展开标题部分的功能。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Customize the visibility and behavior of the outline window.")
regex.target: .setDesc("自定义大纲窗口的可见性和行为。")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Requires a plugin reload to take effect.")
regex.target: .setTooltip("需要重新加载插件才能生效。")

regex.source: .setDesc(Be('To customize the appearance of the Dynamic Outline, please use the Style Settings plugin.'))
regex.target: .setDesc(Be('若要自定义动态大纲的外观，请使用 Style Settings 插件。'))
